name: Talon Sprite Atlas Capture
description: Mirror of talon_atlas.json but with the Talon placed as a sprite (atlas billboard) at world origin instead of a 3D mesh. Lets render_ship_atlas.py orbit the camera and screenshot what the sprite system actually picks at each (az, el) — apples-to-apples comparison against the ground-truth mesh renders, so we can spot orientation/cell-mapping bugs without flying around manually.
